mapper.sql: id, order_fno, po_order_no, po_item_no, quantity, use_time, del_flag, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, end_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation
id,
order_fno,
po_order_no,
po_item_no,
quantity,
use_time,
del_flag,
create_time,
create_user,
update_time,
update_user,
end_user,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{poOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{poItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{useTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_order_no = #{record.poOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_item_no = #{record.poItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_time = #{record.useTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, po_order_no = #{record.poOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, po_item_no = #{record.poItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, use_time = #{record.useTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation
order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_order_no = #{poOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
po_item_no = #{poItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_time = #{useTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_prepare_order_reconciliation set order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, po_order_no = #{poOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, po_item_no = #{poItemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, use_time = #{useTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
